name: Kaymus Resources Inc.
summary: Kaymus Resources Inc. engages in the exploration, acquisition, and development of petroleum and natural gas projects in the Western Canadian Sedimentary Basin. It holds 100% interest in two oil locations, located near the town of Sylvian Lake, Alberta. The company was formerly known as Cascadia Resources Inc. and changed its name to Kaymus Resources Inc. in July 2014. Kaymus Resources Inc. was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Calgary, Canada.
